Women Safety Monitoring System

{/* Description */}

A smart system designed to enhance women's safety during travel using real-time tracking, emergency alerts, and instant assistance.

Real-time Tracking

Emergency Alerts

Police Assistance

Quickly find nearby police stations and get help when needed.
